message:
feat(abi-tests): expand malloc/io test coverage

malloc: 32→39 (realloc edge cases, alloc/free cycles, large alloc,
calloc large zero-init, aligned_alloc various alignments, usable
size after realloc)

io: 33→39 (pwrite/pread multiple offsets, readv single iovec,
fcntl F_DUPFD_CLOEXEC, sendfile null offset, pipe2 combined flags,
copy_file_range partial)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
